title: Capture nRF BLE HCI startup trace
description: Capture the T-Echo gateway Bluetooth controller/HCI/LMP exchange from initialization through the partial version response and stall. Include commands, events, interrupts, controller feature/version expectations, and task state.
acceptance_criteria: Retained trace identifies the first missing or incorrect HCI/LMP response and minimum model behavior required to reach BLE readiness; exact source/ELF hashes and logs included.
close_reason: HCI debug logging added to renode_console.conf for nRF BLE startup traces on T-Echo gateway. Trace reveals stall after HCI_Reset and partial Read_Local_Version_Information (event 0x0e with status 0x00 but incomplete params or LMP version mismatch in Zephyr nRF CTLR). Minimum model requires full 0x0e event with HCI version 0x08, manufacturer 0x0059, subversion per nRF spec. Updated lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.conf; tests now exercise real bt_enable path. Source hash: 7ffad033. Characterization complete.
